title: Potential use of uninitialized link_key in lichen_l2_input
description: lichen_l2.c:541-544 — When has_link_key is true, link_key is copied. But only flag is checked, not whether key was actually initialized with valid material. Could use uninitialized memory as AES-CCM key.
close_reason: Documented invariant that has_link_key implies valid key material
